title: RBI Bulletin – April 2026
description: Today, the Reserve Bank released the April 2026 issue of its monthly Bulletin. The Bulletin includes bi-monthly monetary policy statement (April 8, 2026), two speeches, one article and current statistics. In current statistics, Table 19 on Consumer Price Index is revised in line with the new CPI (base 2024=100) and now includes data on a measure of core inflation (i.e. CPI excluding food and fuel).
